bird.name: 巨嘴拟啄木鸟
bird.summary: 巨嘴拟啄木鸟（台湾作巨嘴擬啄木，学名：Semnornis ramphastinus），是䴕形目巨嘴拟啄木鸟科的一种獨特的鳥類。 巨嘴拟啄木鸟体重约97.7克，翼长约107.2毫米，嘴峰长约22.4毫米，喙宽度约11.3毫米，喙厚度约13.5毫米，跗蹠长约29毫米，尾长约81毫米…

locations.name: 厄瓜多尔
locations.summary: 厄瓜多尔共和国（西班牙語：República del Ecuador），通稱厄瓜多尔（Ecuador），是位於南美洲西北部的國家，北面與哥倫比亞相鄰，南接祕魯，西面為太平洋，另包括距離厄瓜多本土1,000公里的加拉巴哥群島。 厄瓜多於18…

locations.name: 哥伦比亚
locations.summary: 哥伦比亚共和国（西班牙語：República de Colombia），通稱哥倫比亞（西班牙語：Colombia），是一個位於南美洲西北部的国家，同時是拉丁美洲第四大國家，為南美洲國家聯盟的前成員國（2018年8月退出）。它的北部是加勒比…

It uses all forest strata, showing some preference for the upper canopy of the forest () and the subcanopy ().{{cite journal|last1=Laverde| first1=O.| last2=Munera |first2=C

relations.subject: 巨嘴拟啄木鸟
relations.evidence: The toucan barbet is native to humid montane forests, where it occupies all levels of the canopy and is found in both primary and secondary forests, as well as forest edges
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: 巨嘴拟啄木鸟
relations.evidence: Most of the territory consists of mature forest, although the species can adapt to live in forests with small areas of secondary forest or pastures
relations.object_summary: 具备成熟林冠和树洞资源的森林生境。

relations.subject: 巨嘴拟啄木鸟
relations.evidence: It has also declined due to habitat loss, particularly the loss of large trees in which to breed, although the species is adaptable if left unmolested
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 巨嘴拟啄木鸟
relations.evidence: The species is classified as near threatened by the IUCN. Though still fairly common locally, its populations have decreased due to habitat loss, accelerated by massive logging operations, deforestation, cattle grazing, and mining. Illegal trapping for the local and international cage-bird trade is considered to be the main threat to this species, as it is adaptable and can tolerate some habitat modification if left unmolested. Heavy trapping pressure and habitat fragmentation due to forest clearing are thought to be responsible for some localised extinctions of this species.{{cite journal |last1=Kattan |first1=Gustavo H
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
